Name: Ember
Effect: A small spark, hungry for tinder.
ArtConcept: A small candle flame caught between two fingertips, drawn as a sigil. Warm orange glow.

Name: Drop
Effect: Heals 1 HP on cast.
ArtConcept: A single suspended droplet with concentric ripples beneath it. Cool blue, silver linework.

Name: Stone
Effect: Heavy. Sure.
ArtConcept: An angular polyhedron of carved stone, mossy edges, set inside a circle. Earthen browns.

Name: Gust
Effect: +1 power to the next rune in line.
ArtConcept: Three curving wind lines emerging from a central dot. Pale grey-blue, delicate.

Name: Hollow
Effect: Strips the enemy's ward this turn.
ArtConcept: A perfect ring with darkness inside, ringed by tiny tick marks. Deep purple-black.

Name: Ray
Effect: +50% vs Shadow-aligned foes.
ArtConcept: A six-pointed star with one elongated ray, golden filament, halation.

Name: Veil
Effect: Draw +1 card after cast.
ArtConcept: A crescent moon partially obscured by a horizontal drape of darkness. Indigo and silver.

Name: Tally
Effect: +1 power per other Order rune in spell.
ArtConcept: A precise cross with four small numerals at the points. Gold leaf on cream.

Name: Roll
Effect: Random power: 1 to 5.
ArtConcept: A many-sided die mid-tumble, surrounded by random tally marks. Magenta and gold sparks.

Name: Echo
Effect: Triggers the rune to its left a second time.
ArtConcept: A bell-shape with three concentric ripple-bells emerging from it. Brass gold.

Name: Mirror
Effect: Copies the element and shape of the rune to its left.
ArtConcept: Two crescents forming a yin-yang of cracked glass. Iridescent.

Name: Surge
Effect: +50% power to runes beside it.
ArtConcept: A starburst of flame petals, eight points, hot center white. Orange-red.

Name: Cascade
Effect: All later runes also deal their damage as bonus.
ArtConcept: A vertical chain of three diminishing droplets, each connected by a wavy line. Aquamarine.

Name: Anchor
Effect: +1 power to every other Earth rune.
ArtConcept: An anchor-cross with roots growing into the earth below. Bronze and umber.

Name: Drift
Effect: +2 power for each rune to its right.
ArtConcept: A feather pulled by an unseen current, leaving a curving trail. Pale silver.

Name: Drain
Effect: Heals you for half its damage.
ArtConcept: A downward spiral of dark liquid disappearing into a small drain glyph. Deep purple.

Name: Beacon
Effect: +100% to next rune cast after this one.
ArtConcept: A lighthouse-style burst with twelve evenly spaced rays. Hot gold.

Name: Sympathy
Effect: Copies your most-played rune this run.
ArtConcept: Two infinity-loops intertwined, one bright one dark. Violet and silver.

Name: Ouroboros
Effect: Re-casts the entire spell once. Once per turn.
ArtConcept: A serpent biting its own tail, scales like alchemical sigils. Crimson and gold leaf.

Name: Twin
Effect: First rune in the spell fires twice more.
ArtConcept: Two identical sigils overlapping at the center, slight rotational offset. Mirror-bright gold.

Name: Triskelion
Effect: +200% if all three slots share an element.
ArtConcept: Three interlocked spirals forming a triskelion. Celtic-illuminated, gold on green-black.

Name: Wildfire
Effect: Strikes twice. Burns for 2 next turn.
ArtConcept: Flames forming a chain of running figures, sweeping across the sigil. Vermillion.

Name: Tidewall
Effect: +1 damage per missing HP of yours.
ArtConcept: A vertical wall of crested wave, foam at top, deep blue base. Hokusai-inspired.

Name: Quake
Effect: Stuns the enemy. Skips their next attack.
ArtConcept: Cracked ground in an eight-pointed fracture pattern, depth in cracks. Sandstone and ash.

Name: Tempest
Effect: +1 power per other Air rune in your hand or deck.
ArtConcept: Three lightning bolts forming a triangle around a tornado funnel. Cyan and steel.

Name: Eclipse
Effect: Damage cannot be reduced this turn.
ArtConcept: A black disc with corona ring, single golden tear of light at three o'clock. Astral.

Name: Recursion
Effect: Triggers itself once. Stacks with other Recursions.
ArtConcept: A spiral that nests into itself infinitely, Escher-like, gold ink on indigo. Sacred geometry.

Name: Pandemonium
Effect: Every rune in your hand also fires this turn.
ArtConcept: A crown of seven different sigils orbiting a central void. Black gold, asymmetric chaos.

Name: Singularity
Effect: Multiplies all damage by your hand size.
ArtConcept: A pinprick of light pulling all lines toward it, accretion disc effect. Deep violet to white.

Name: Aurora
Effect: ×5 damage if all three slots are different elements.
ArtConcept: A radiant crown of nine colored rays in a halo arrangement, prismatic. Iridescent gold.

Name: Crescendo
Effect: XMULT ×(1 + 6% of all power inscribed before it). Reward for going last.
ArtConcept: ⚠ NEW — no concept yet, needs art direction

Name: Culminate
Effect: XMULT ×(1 + 11% of all power inscribed before it). The final word.
ArtConcept: ⚠ NEW — no concept yet, needs art direction

Name: Squall
Effect: +1 power per other Air rune in the spell, ×2 if it is in slot III.
ArtConcept: ⚠ NEW — no concept yet, needs art direction

Name: Undertow
Effect: +1 power to every later rune for each Water rune placed before it.
ArtConcept: ⚠ NEW — no concept yet, needs art direction

Name: Umbral Knot
Effect: KEYSTONE · globalMult ×1.6 if any earlier rune has basePower ≥ 3.
ArtConcept: ⚠ NEW — no concept yet, needs art direction

Name: Lumen
Effect: KEYSTONE · XMULT ×(1 + 8% of all power inscribed before it). Place last.
ArtConcept: ⚠ NEW — no concept yet, needs art direction

ArtConcept: A small flickering being made of soot and embers, hunched. Reluctant. Coal-black with orange glow inside its chest cavity.

Name: Wisp
Effect: threat 2 · tag air
ArtConcept: A ghostly translucent figure, half-formed, drifting upward. Pale ice-blue. Disinterested expression suggested.

Name: Fenmote
Effect: threat 2 · tag earth
ArtConcept: A small, mossy, stone-skinned thing with lichen growing on its shoulders. Stubborn squat posture. Forest greens, mineral browns.

Name: Hollow Wight
Effect: threat 3 · tag void
ArtConcept: A robed figure with too many teeth visible through the dark hood, no eyes. Tatters of black cloth. Purple-black palette with bone-white teeth highlight.

Name: Sirenshade
Effect: threat 3 · tag water
ArtConcept: A water-haired figure half-submerged, mouth open in song but the wrong shape. Deep blue-green, scaled details, eerie.

Name: Brass Revenant
Effect: threat 4 · tag order
ArtConcept: A man-shaped automaton of brass, hollow inside, with bell-mouth where head should be. Verdigris and gold. Stoic, regal pose.

Name: Glass Wyrm
Effect: threat 4 · tag chaos
ArtConcept: A serpentine creature made of fractured stained glass, multiple eye-shapes embedded across its body. Iridescent, cracked.

Name: The Sovereign
Effect: threat 5 · tag void
ArtConcept: A regal silhouette wearing a crown of seven runes, robed in shadow, eyes closed but somehow watching. The most ornate image. Black and gold, single red highlight.

Name: Title Mark
Effect: Game logo sigil, reads inside a circular gold frame
ArtConcept: central ritual mark / sigil for the game logo
